howItWorks.title: How Culinse Works
howItWorks.subtitle: We bring the internet's best recipes to you — personalized, searchable, and with shopping coming soon.

steps.title: Search & Discover

cta.title: Start discovering recipes today.
cta.subtitle: Free forever. No subscription. Just great food, personalized for you.

about.heroSubtitle: Culinse was born out of a real frustration — spending 20 minutes visiting site after site, just to find one decent recipe for dinner.

values.title: Craft
values.desc: Built by someone who has spent years behind the stove and the counter.

values.title: Passion
values.desc: Food is more than fuel. Culinse is for people who actually love to cook.

values.title: Simplicity
values.desc: No ads, no subscriptions, no clutter. Just recipes you'll want to make.

visionItems.title: Weekly Meal Planner
visionItems.desc: Plan your whole week in minutes. Culinse picks recipes that match your diet, schedule, and what's already in your fridge.

visionItems.title: Smart Shopping Lists
visionItems.desc: Auto-generate a shopping list from your weekly plan — or send it directly to your favorite grocery delivery service.

visionItems.title: Recipe Albums
visionItems.desc: Curate your own collections and share them with friends, family, or the world.

visionItems.title: Everything in One Place
visionItems.desc: One platform. Every recipe. No more browser tabs. From quick weeknight dinners to ambitious weekend projects.

about.story1: I started out as a head chef, cooking in restaurants across Germany. After that, I turned to the butcher's craft — and in 2024 I earned the title of Fleischermeister (German Master Butcher), the highest professional qualification in the trade. Food isn't something I do on the side. It's everything.
about.story2: But even with all that background, the everyday problem was the same: finding the right recipe meant juggling a dozen browser tabs, clicking past cookie banners, and scrolling through life stories before getting to the actual ingredients. For something that's supposed to be enjoyable, it was exhausting.
about.story3: I kept thinking — why doesn't a platform exist that just works? One place, great recipes, no noise. The way music discovery works, but for food. So I built it.
about.name: Peter

pro.title: Culinse Pro
pro.subtitle: Unlock the full Culinse experience.
features: Automatic shopping list with combined amounts
pro.heroSubtitle: Plan your week, build your shopping list, and organize every recipe you love — all in one place.

faqItems.q: Can I cancel at any time?
faqItems.a: Yes, cancel anytime from your profile. You keep Pro access until the end of your billing period.
All major credit and debit cards via Stripe. Safe, encrypted, PCI compliant.

faqItems.q: What happens to my Collections if I cancel?
faqItems.a: Your collections stay saved. You just won't be able to create new ones beyond the free limit.
Not yet — but with Collections free you can already try the core features before upgrading.
